examples: With my love I'll amour you.
Riva plays a woman struggling with old age and death in Haneke's Amour.
Michael Haneke's Love, or Amour, takes place in the apartment of an old couple as their lives reach their ends.
Amour and Rust and Bone are up for best non-English language film alongside Untouchable.
Or if you prefer, how silly it acts in defence of some national amour propre.
